_comment: Holy Vibe — База віршів. Додавай нові об'єкти в масив 'verses'.

_fields.cat: Категорія: peace | love | fear | strength | hope | healing

ui._comment: Рядки інтерфейсу. При перекладі — перекладай тільки значення, не ключі.

verses.text:
The Lord is my Shepherd,
I will not be in want.
verses.ai: It's not about material security - it's about the state of the heart, which stops panicking. When God becomes your Shepherd, you no longer seek convulsive control over the future. Your deficiency is covered by His Presence.

verses.text:
Peace I leave you, My peace I give you;
not as the world giveth, give I unto you.
verses.ai: The world gives peace because of the absence of problems. God's peace is supernatural: it comes in the midst of the storm. When it is logical to scream out of panic, the incomprehensible silence of Shalom reigns inside you.

verses.text:
Calm down and know
that I am God!
verses.ai: In the original, it literally means "put your hands down", "stop messing around". Often we try to close all the cracks ourselves. But God says: stop, breathe out, let Me be God in your situation.

verses.text:
Come to Me, all you who labor
and burdened - and I will comfort you!
verses.ai: Religion demands: do more, meet the criteria. Jesus suggests the opposite. Come tired, come exhausted. His Presence is a place where there is no need to prove anything.

verses.text:
The peace of God that prevails
every mind will guard your hearts
and your thoughts in Christ Jesus.
verses.ai: This peace is not explained logically - it "surpasses all understanding." You cannot produce it by effort of will. He is a gift that comes when you trust God with your anxiety.

verses.text:
You will keep in complete peace
one whose mind firmly rests on You.
verses.ai: Peace is not the absence of worries, but the presence of God in your mind. When your thoughts are "firmly resting" on Him, fear has no place to take root.

verses.text:
The Lord will lift up His face upon you
and will give you peace.
verses.ai: This ancient blessing sounds like parental tenderness. The Lord looks at you with love - not with condemnation - and in this look a deep, unshakable peace is born.

verses.text:
God is love, and whoever abides in love
he abides in God.
verses.ai: Love is not just an emotion of God, it is His essence. You cannot make Him love you less by your mistakes or more by your achievements. You simply immerse yourself in the ocean of love that is already there.

verses.text:
Taste and see
what a good Lord!
Blessed is the man who puts his hope in Him.
verses.ai: God cannot be understood theoretically - He must be "tasted" personally. When you feel His real kindness at least once, your worldview will change forever.

verses.text:
Nothing can separate us
from the love of God
that is in Christ Jesus our Lord.
verses.ai: There is no distance between you and God that He cannot overcome. Your guilt, crises, despair - nothing will break the concrete bond of His love for you. You are forever safe.

verses.text:
Here I am standing at the door and knocking.
If anyone hears My voice
and will open the door - I will enter him.
verses.ai: The Creator of the Universe never breaks down the door of the heart by force. He stands and quietly knocks because of the circumstances, the yearnings of the soul. He is waiting for your conscious choice to open and let Him in.

verses.text:
i loved you
eternal love
verses.ai: Not "I will love you if..." and not "I loved you until...". Eternal love — without conditions, without end, without dependence on your actions. It is a foundation on which to stand.

verses.text:
That you, rooted and established in love,
could comprehend with all the saints
width and length, height and depth.
verses.ai: The love of Christ has four dimensions, and no mind can fully grasp it. But you can dive into it deeper and deeper, and open a new ocean each time.

verses.text:
Love is patient, love is merciful,
love does not envy, does not boast.
verses.ai: This is not a description of human love - it is a portrait of God. As you read this list, imagine that God is saying this about His relationship with you personally. Every word is about Him and you.

verses.text:
Fear not, for I am with you;
do not look back in fear, for I am your God.
verses.ai: Fear does not disappear from a change of circumstances - it disappears from the awareness of Who is nearby. God doesn't remove the difficult, He holds your hand in it. When the Almighty is near, fear loses weight.

verses.text:
Who lives under the protection of the Most High,
he rests under the shadow of the Almighty.
verses.ai: The shadow of the Almighty is a place of complete isolation from the arrows of the enemy. This does not mean that there is no danger around - it means that there is a heavenly dome of protection spread over you.

verses.text:
Because God did not give us the spirit of fear,
and the spirit of strength, love and common sense.
verses.ai: Fear is not from God. This is important to know. When panic or anxiety comes, it is not His voice. His gift is strength, love and a clear mind. You can choose to accept this gift now.

verses.text:
Even when I walk through the valley
the shadow of death - I will not be afraid of disaster,
because you are with me
verses.ai: David does not deny the dark valley—he passes through it. But the key word is "with me". The presence of God turns the most terrible road into a passable one.

verses.text:
Cast all your cares upon Him,
because He cares about you.
verses.ai: The Greek word here is "cast." Not "neatly put", but throw like a heavy backpack. God is not asking you to carry it with Him. He asks you to let him go - completely.

verses.text:
There is no fear in love;
but perfect love casts out fear.
verses.ai: Fear and love cannot live in the same place at the same time. When you fill your heart with the knowledge of God's love for you, there is simply no room for fear.

verses.text:
The Lord is my light and my salvation;
who should I be afraid of?
verses.ai: David does not ask rhetorically - he really answers his own question. If the Lord is your light, the darkness loses its power. If He is your salvation, nothing is a final threat.

verses.text:
I can do everything in Tim
Who strengthens me is in Christ.
verses.ai: Paul wrote this from prison. It's not about superhero omnipotence—it's about being able to get through any season with an inner source of strength that never runs dry.

verses.text:
Those who put their hope in the Lord,
will regain their strength, raise their wings like eagles.
verses.ai: Even the young and strong fall from fatigue. But when you "wait on the Lord", a supernatural exchange takes place: you give your weakness and receive His inexhaustible energy.

verses.text:
Be strong in the Lord
and in the might of His power.
verses.ai: Not one's own strength, but the Lord's. It relieves the pressure of "being strong enough". You simply connect to a source that has no limits. It's available to you right now.

verses.text:
For My strength is perfected in weakness.
I will brag about my infirmities the best,
that the power of Christ may rest upon me.
verses.ai: The paradox of the Kingdom of God: weakness becomes space for His power. When you stop pretending to be strong and honestly admit your limits, that's when God can fully work through you.

verses.text:
The Lord is my strength and my shield;
my heart trusted in Him, and He helped me.
verses.ai: Two in one person: strength and shield. It not only protects you from the outside, but also gives you inner strength. Trust of the heart is the key that unlocks both gifts.

verses.text: The joy of the Lord is your strength.
verses.ai: Joy here is not an emotion, but a spiritual state. It does not depend on the circumstances. When your joy is rooted in the Lord and not in the situation, nothing can take away your strength.

verses.text:
I know the thoughts I think about you—
thoughts of peace and not of evil,
to give you a future and hope.
verses.ai: These words were spoken to the people in captivity. When it seems that your life is on pause or destroyed - God's plan for you has not changed. His thoughts about you are always filled with peace and recovery.

verses.text:
To all who love God,
everything contributes to the good.
verses.ai: God is able to melt even chaos, mistakes and painful seasons into gold. Not everything that happens is good. But God has enough sovereign power to weave together any fragments into a masterpiece.

verses.text:
In You, Lord, I hoped;
I will not be ashamed forever.
verses.ai: Hope in God is the only hope that will never fail. People, plans, circumstances can disappoint. But the one who firmly anchors himself in the Lord will never be ashamed.

verses.text:
Hope is the anchor of the soul for us,
reliable and durable.
verses.ai: An anchor doesn't save you from a storm—it keeps you in place during it. Hope in God does not promise quiet weather, it promises that you will not be swept into the open sea of ​​despair.

verses.text:
It comes back to my heart
therefore I hope: God's mercy
did not end
verses.ai: Jeremiah writes this in the ruins of destroyed Jerusalem. Even in the deepest grief, he finds one point of hope - God's mercies never end. New ones every morning.

verses.text:
Trust in the Lord
be brave and let your heart be strong.
verses.ai: "Hope" here is an active word, not a passive expectation. It is a conscious choice to choose God over despair every day. Courage and hope are not feelings, but decisions.

verses.text:
Prayer of faith
heal the sick
and the Lord will raise him up.
verses.ai: The prayer of faith is not a manipulation of God, but a complete surrender to His power. When the mind says "it's over" and the body weakens, faith looks at Christ's wounds and knows: He will lift.

verses.text:
The Spirit of the Lord is upon me,
for He anointed Me
to heal the brokenhearted.
verses.ai: Jesus' anointing involved healing broken hearts—not just bodies. He came to people who were rejected by society. If you are broken, you are exactly the person He came to.

verses.text:
He heals the brokenhearted
and bandages their wounds.
verses.ai: God doesn't wait for you to "get it together." He comes to the broken, not the whole. Bandaging a wound is a gentle, close action. He does not remove removed - He comes close.

verses.text:
But He took upon Himself our infirmities
and bore our diseases.
verses.ai: Seven centuries before Golgotha, the prophet described what Jesus did on the cross. He didn't just feel sorry for you from afar - He personally took your pain, your illness upon Himself.

verses.text: By his wounds you are healed.
verses.ai: The Greek tense here is perfect: "you are already healed." Not "there will be healing" - it already is. The cross is a completed action. Your task is to get what has already been bought.

verses.text:
Because I will restore your health
and heal you from your wounds,
says the Lord.
verses.ai: God says this to a people with wounds inflicted by enemies. There is no wound so old or deep that He cannot mend. His specialty is hopeless cases.

verses.text:
And let the peace of Christ reign
in your hearts.
verses.ai: "Reigns" is like a judge at a competition. The world has the right to pronounce a verdict in your heart, to decide what stays and what goes out. Give him this power deliberately.

verses.text:
I came that they might have
life and had it to the fullest.
verses.ai: "Completely" means beyond measure, over the edge. God did not plan for you to survive. He planned fullness. If you live in constant lack, that is not His plan for you.

verses.text:
walk in love
as Christ loved us.
verses.ai: Love here is not a feeling, but a way of walking every day. It is a choice, a direction, a rhythm. Christ showed what it looks like in practice - full, sacrificial, unconditional presence for another.

verses.text: We love because He first loved us.
verses.ai: Our ability to love is derived from His love for us. If you find it difficult to love people, go back to the source. Fill yourself with His love for you, and it will naturally begin to flow to others.

verses.text:
Fear was dealt with by faith,
having built an ark for the salvation of his house.
verses.ai: Noah built an ark for the rain that no one had ever seen. True faith is action in the face of fear, not the absence of fear. He was afraid - and he built anyway.

verses.text: Don't be afraid, just believe.
verses.ai: Jesus said this to the father who was informed of his daughter's death. In the darkest moment, not long explanations, but one simple task: believe. Fear and faith cannot rule at the same time.

verses.text: Where is your faith, little believers?
verses.ai: The disciples were in the storm with Jesus - and still they were afraid. He did not condemn them, but asked: Where is your faith? The presence of Christ in your "boat" changes everything - if you believe it.

verses.text:
The Lord is my rock, my fortress
and my deliverer.
verses.ai: Three images at the same time: an immovable foundation, a protected place, the one who leads to freedom. God is all three for you right now, in any situation.

verses.text:
Not by force or power,
but by My Spirit, says the Lord.
verses.ai: The greatest victories in the Kingdom of God do not come through human strength, but through His Spirit. When your resources are not enough, this is exactly the condition for His action.

verses.text:
The Lord is my rock,
he is worthy of glory.
verses.ai: David wrote this after decades of persecution and war. Rock does not move during an earthquake. When everything around is shaking, God remains the same immovable.

verses.text:
Why are you sad, my soul?
and are you worried about me?
Trust in God.
verses.ai: The psalmist speaks to his soul. This is an important practice: not letting emotions rule, but teaching them. "Trust in God" is not a denial of the sum, but a choice of direction.

verses.text:
And let the God of hope fill you
with all joy and peace in faith.
verses.ai: God is here called "the God of hope" - this is one of His names. He is the primary source of hope, not just its object. To pray for hope is to pray to the One who is hope itself.

verses.text:
They are new every morning;
Your faithfulness is great!
verses.ai: Every morning is a clean start. God does not keep track of your failures yesterday. Each new day is a new portion of His faithfulness. Literally, new favors from the morning.

verses.text:
Praise the Lord, my soul,
and do not forget all His good deeds.
He forgives all your iniquities,
heals all your diseases.
verses.ai: David puts forgiveness and healing side by side as two manifestations of the same God's goodness. Healing here is not an exception, but part of the regular "menu" of His goodness to you.

verses.text: I am the Lord who heals you.
verses.ai: "Yahweh Rofe" - "The Lord is your physician." This is one of the names of God. Not a "God who sometimes heals" but a God whose nature is to heal. It's who He is, not what He does.

verses.text:
The Word of God is alive and active,
sharper than anything
a double-edged sword.
verses.ai: The word is not just a text, it lives. When you read the Bible, something happens in the spiritual dimension. It goes deeper than any thoughts and touches where you really are.

verses.text:
Your word is a lamp to my feet
and the light of my path.
verses.ai: The lantern does not illuminate the entire path - only the next step. God rarely reveals everything at once. But there is always enough light for the next step.

verses.text:
If you stay
in my word
then you are truly My disciples.
verses.ai: "To be" is not to read, but to live inside. The word is not information for the head, but an environment for the soul. The difference between one who knows about God and one who knows God.
Three verbs, and all in the continuous tense: "keep asking, searching, knocking." Prayer is not a one-time push button, it is a constant dialogue with the One who always answers.

verses.text:
If any of you lack wisdom,
let him ask God
Which gives generously.
verses.ai: God gives wisdom "generously and without reproach." He doesn't sigh when you come again. He is happy with your question. A question is a form of trust.

verses.text:
don't worry about anything
but in all things by prayer and supplication
open your desires to God with gratitude.
verses.ai: "Don't worry" is not an order not to feel, but an offer of an alternative. Instead of anxiety, pray with thanksgiving. Not because everything is good, but because God is good and He hears.

verses.text:
Faith is the basis
for what we hope
evidence of things not seen.
verses.ai: Faith is not blindness, but seeing in a different way. She sees the reality of God's Kingdom, which is not yet physically visible. This is not ignoring the facts, it is knowing the higher facts.

verses.text: All things are possible to those who believe.
verses.ai: Jesus said this to the father of the sick child when he said "if you can." Christ's answer turns the question upside down: it's not about My ability, but about your faith. Faith is the key, not His power.

verses.text:
Therefore, faith comes from hearing,
and hearing through the Word of Christ.
verses.ai: Faith is not taken from the ceiling. It grows through regular contact with the Word. This is a practical recipe: if you want more faith - more Word. Let him speak to you.

verses.text:
For we are His creation,
created in Christ Jesus
for good deeds.
verses.ai: You are God's creation, not an accident. And you are not created for survival, but for good deeds, which He has prepared in advance just for you. You have an appointment.

verses.text:
But you are the chosen race
royal priesthood
the people are holy.
verses.ai: These words were spoken to ordinary people - fishermen, artisans, slaves. God does not see you through the lens of your past or social status. He sees you through Christ.

verses.text:
I don't live anymore
but Christ lives in me.
verses.ai: The most profound change in identity is not the improvement of the old self, but the new self through Christ. You are not a corrected version of yourself. You are a new creation with Christ inside.

verses.text:
Therefore, whoever is in Christ is a new creation;
the old has passed away, the new has come.
verses.ai: "It became new" is the perfect tense. It has already happened. Your past does not define your identity in Christ. You are already a new person - you will not become one, but already are.

verses.text:
For by grace you are saved
through faith
and it is not from you - God's gift.
verses.ai: Salvation is a gift that cannot be earned. Not by sufficient prayer, not by good deeds. You just accept. It frees you from the endless struggle to "become enough."

verses.text:
Where sin multiplied,
there grace became even more abundant.
verses.ai: No matter how deep the pit, grace is deeper. God does not calculate whether it will be "enough" for you. It is redundant by nature.

verses.text:
My grace is enough for you,
for My strength is made perfect in weakness.
verses.ai: Pavlo asked to remove the "thorn". God replied, "My grace is sufficient." Sometimes He does not remove the problem - He gives enough grace to live it with dignity.

verses.text:
Where can I escape from Your Spirit?
Where will I go from Your face?
verses.ai: David does not complain - he is surprised. God is everywhere - not as a guardian, but as a caring Father. There is no place where you would be outside of His attention and love.

verses.text:
And here I am with you all the days
until the end of the age.
verses.ai: The last words of Jesus in the Gospel of Matthew are not "forgive", but "I am with you". After the resurrection. Forever. All the days - even the darkest, even the bleakest.

verses.text:
My presence will go with you
and I will give you rest.
verses.ai: God tells Moses that he will not just "help" - he will go along with him. His Presence is peace. Not a plan, not resources, not answers — but simply He Himself is there.

verses.text:
Thank you for everything
for this is the will of God for you in Christ Jesus.
verses.ai: "In everything" is not "for everything". God does not ask for thanks for evil. But in any circumstances you can find a reason for gratitude. It is a practice that changes the perception of reality.

verses.text:
I bless the Lord always;
praise to Him is always in my mouth.
verses.ai: "All the time" - not only when it's good. David wrote this while hiding from his enemies. Praise in the dark is the most powerful. She says: I choose to believe regardless of the circumstances.

verses.text:
If we confess our sins,
then He is faithful and righteous,
to forgive us our sins.
verses.ai: "Faithful and righteous" - forgiveness here is not a whim of God, but His character. He cannot help but forgive, because that would be a contradiction of His nature. Recognition is the key. Forgiveness is a guarantee.

verses.text:
How far is east from west
so He moved away from us
our transgressions.
verses.ai: East and West will never meet. God chose the longest possible distance to describe where your sins go after forgiveness. They're not just hidden—they're eliminated.

verses.text:
You will throw it into the depths of the sea
all our sins.
verses.ai: Throwing them into the depths of the sea is not putting them on a shelf where you can get them. It's forever. God does not remind you of what He threw into the sea. Only you sometimes swim back on them.

verses.text:
Trust in the Lord with all your heart
and lean not on your own understanding.
Remember Him in all your ways,
and He will guide you.
verses.ai: "Direct" does not mean that there will be no turns. Means that even turns will be part of the right path. Trust is handing over the navigator to the One who sees the whole route.

verses.text:
The Lord directs the steps of man
and guards her path.
verses.ai: "Steps" are not only big decisions, but every everyday step. God is interested in the details of your life. Nothing is too small for Him not to see and guide.

verses.text:
And your ears will hear a word from behind,
which says: this is the road, go on it.
verses.ai: God follows you and says: "here", "not there". He is not silent. The question is whether we are quiet enough to hear His voice behind our own thoughts.
Greener pastures are not a reward for good behavior. The shepherd leads there because he loves. He knows where food is, where water is, where rest is. Trust in the Shepherd is peace.

verses.text:
I am the resurrection and the life.
He who believes in me will live,
even if he died.
verses.ai: Jesus does not say "I will give the resurrection" - He says "I am the resurrection." It is not a service He provides. It is He Himself. When you have Him, you also have resurrection.

verses.text:
And to Him who can do
immeasurably more than all
what we ask or think.
verses.ai: "Immeasurably more" is beyond your wildest wishes. God is not limited by your imagination of the possible. Sometimes the biggest obstacle to His action is the ceiling of our expectations.

verses.text:
Rejoice in the Lord
and He will give you
your heart's desire.
verses.ai: "Rejoice in the Lord" is not a condition for obtaining desires, but a transformation of desires themselves. When you rejoice in Him, your desires begin to match His. And then He gives them.

verses.text:
Search first of all
The kingdom of God and His truth,
and all that will be added to you.
verses.ai: "It will be added" is a passive state: you don't get it, but it is given to you. God offers a deal: you take care of the main thing - He takes care of the rest. Prioritize correctly.

verses.text: If God is for us, who is against us?
verses.ai: Paul does not claim that there are no enemies. It raises the question of scale. If the Almighty is on your side, no opposition can be decisive. Numbers don't matter.

verses.text:
In Him was life,
and that life was the light of men.
verses.ai: Jesus didn't just bring light—He is the source of life itself. When you touch Him, you touch the very root of existence. Everything lives from Him and in Him.

verses.text:
You enveloped me
front and back
and put Your hand on me.
verses.ai: God does not watch from afar. It wraps: in front - in your future, behind - in your past. And His hand is upon you now. You are literally in His arms.

verses.text:
Will a woman forget her baby?
But if she forgot too,
I will not forget you.
verses.ai: God chooses the most intense human form of love—a mother's love for an infant—and says: My love for you is stronger than even that. You are unforgettable to Him.

verses.text:
Take courage and hold on,
don't be afraid and don't be afraid
for the Lord your God is with you.
verses.ai: This is not advice - it is God's command to Joshua before an impossible task. Courage is not the absence of fear, but the decision to act despite it, knowing Who is nearby.

verses.text:
I am the Alpha and the Omega
first and last
beginning and end.
verses.ai: God covers the whole spectrum, from beginning to end. Your story doesn't end where you think it will. He is Omega: the last word is always His, and that word is victory.
God cannot be understood purely theoretically - He must be experienced personally. One real experience of His goodness is more persuasive than a thousand theological arguments.

verses.text:
Fear not, little herd,
for your Father is pleased
give you the Kingdom.
verses.ai: "Small herd" is an appeal to those who feel they are a minority, insignificant. God is not grieved by your number. He is happy to give you the Kingdom. Not to earn - to get.

verses.text:
Jesus Christ - yesterday and today
the same, and the eyelids.
verses.ai: In a world where everything changes - He is unchanging. That Jesus, Who healed, forgave, resurrected - He is the same today. His character, His power, His love are unchanging.

verses.text:
faithful God,
That will prevent you from being tempted
beyond strength
verses.ai: God knows your limit better than you. He does not give trials that will break you - but gives a way out. Looking for a way out is not weakness, it is the wisdom of a person who knows who God is.

verses.text:
The Lord is close to those who
who is heartbroken
and will save those who are discouraged in spirit.
verses.ai: God is not far from those who suffer - He is closest there. A broken heart is not a distance from God, but the point of His maximum closeness to you.

verses.text:
If my people humble themselves,
What is called by my name
I will hear from heaven and forgive their sin
and I will heal their land.
verses.ai: Healing here is not only personal, but social. The prayer and humility of individuals can change the atmosphere of entire communities and peoples. Your prayer has more impact than you think.

verses.text:
And God will wipe away every tear
from their eyes
and there will be no more death.
verses.ai: The end of history is not a catastrophe. It is God who personally wipes away every tear. The word "each" means individually. He remembers your every cry and will come Himself to wipe it away.

verses.text:
And here I am with you
all day long
until the end of the age.
verses.ai: The last promise of the Gospel of Matthew is not power, not miracles, but simply "I am with you." Presence is the greatest gift. Not all good days. All days without exception.

verses.text:
take a look
what love the Father gave us
so that we can be called and be children of God!
verses.ai: The love of the Creator elevates us from the status of creation to the status of His own children.
Each new day is a new manifestation of God's mercy and love for us.

verses.text: Lord, your mercy to the heavens, your truth to the clouds!
verses.ai: The grandeur of God's love covers all of humanity.

verses.text: Look at the birds of the sky... Your Heavenly Father feeds them. Aren't you worth much more than them?
verses.ai: If the Creator takes care of nature, then He takes care of man - His main creation - all the more.

verses.text:
And how are you sons?
then God sent the Spirit of His Son into your hearts,
Who calls out: "Abba, Father!"
verses.ai: We have the right to address God with the gentlest word "Tatu" (Abba).

verses.text: The Lord is for me - I will not be afraid: what will man do to me?
verses.ai: Knowing that God is on our side overcomes all human fear.

verses.text: The fruit of the spirit is: love, joy, peace, long-suffering, kindness...
verses.ai: The first and most important fruit of the action of the Holy Spirit in man is love.

verses.text: Love is patient, love is merciful, does not envy...
verses.ai: A description of how God's love works through man when he allows God to rule his heart.

verses.text: ...because I am the Lord, your Healer!
verses.ai: God presents himself not just as a Judge or Creator, but as your personal medical center. Healing is His name and nature.

verses.text: And the Lord will remove all sickness from you...
verses.ai: God puts a distance between you and viruses or infirmities. The disease loses the right to approach you.

verses.text: I will saturate him with the length of days, and I will reveal My salvation to him!
verses.ai: God promises not just a short survival, but a long, rich and quality life where you will see His glory.

verses.text:
He sent His word and healed them,
and saved their graves from them!
verses.ai: God's Word has the speed of light and the power of a surgical instrument. When it comes, the disease recedes.

verses.text: ...You will make me healthy and give me life!
verses.ai: Short and precise proclamation. Healing and life come as a direct command from God.

verses.text:
And those
who trusts in the Lord
they will regain their strength, they will raise their wings, like those eagles, they will run - and not get tired, they will walk - and they will not turn blue!
verses.ai: Hope in God initiates a process of supernatural rejuvenation and physical endurance.

verses.text:
And he was wounded for our sins,
he was tormented for our iniquities,
His punishment was for our peace, but with his wounds we were healed!
verses.ai: Your healing is already an accomplished fact in the past tense. The price was paid by the scars on the body of Christ.

verses.text:
Because I will put a band-aid on you,
and heal you of your wounds
says the Lord...
verses.ai: Even if your wounds are deep or inflicted by others, God has the best spiritual medicine and full restoration.

verses.text: Behold, I will grow a plaster and medicine for him, and I will cure him...
verses.ai: Where earthly medicine falters, God grows supernatural remedies for your situation.

verses.text: ...and I will bind up the broken, and strengthen the painful...
verses.ai: The tender attitude of the Good Shepherd towards your weak and damaged places. He will thoroughly repair everything.

verses.text:
Thus says the Lord God to these bones: Behold, I will put spirit into you,
and you will live!
verses.ai: Even if your health resembles dry, dead bones, God's breath can raise new life from the ruins.

verses.text: And I will put My Spirit in you, and you will live...
verses.ai: The Holy Spirit within you is a powerful force that animates every cell in your body.

verses.text:
And for you
who fears my name
the Sun of Truth and healing will rise in His rays, and you will go out and gallop like those well-fed calves!
verses.ai: The rays of God's light burn away the disease and give you back your childlike joy, lightness and energy of movement.

verses.text: ...I want to clean up!
verses.ai: The two most important words for your healing. God not only can, He sincerely wants you to be healthy.

verses.text:
And they marveled excessively and said: He does all things well: He gives hearing to the deaf,
and speech to the dumb!
verses.ai: God's restoration of the body is always flawless. It restores damaged functions to perfect condition.

verses.text: ...they will lay hands on the sick, and they will be well!
verses.ai: God has delegated His power to believing people. A simple touch with a prayer of faith changes a person's physical condition.

verses.text:
Shouldn't this daughter of Abraham be freed from these bonds of the Sabbath day,
that Satan had bound her for eighteen years?
verses.ai: Sickness is the devil's bond, but Jesus has an ironclad legal justification for why you should be free right now.

verses.text: ...I have come that you may have life, and have it abundantly!
verses.ai: Illness steals your time and strength, but Christ has brought life in such abundance that it supersedes any weakness.

verses.text: Jesus Christ yesterday, today, and forever is the same!
verses.ai: If He healed two thousand years ago on the roads of Galilee, He does it with the same power for you today. He hasn't changed.

verses.text:
...choose life
that you and your descendants may live... for the Son is your life and the length of your days...
verses.ai: Health and life are your daily conscious choices based on love for God.

verses.text:
Then it sows,
like the morning dawn
your light, and your wound will heal quickly...
verses.ai: When you live according to God's heart, the processes of regeneration and healing of wounds in your body happen instantly.

verses.text:
heal me
god
and I will be healed, save me, and I will be saved, for You are my glory!
verses.ai: A prayer of complete surrender to God's power. Its healing leaves a permanent and irreversible result.

verses.text:
come on
and return to the Lord
because He cut - and He will heal us, He struck - and He will bind up our wounds!
verses.ai: Returning to the right relationship with the Creator automatically starts the rehabilitation process.
The Creator's touch restores lost organs and functions. The darkness disappears.

verses.text:
And He had mercy,
stretch out your hand
touched him and said to him: I want - clean yourself!
verses.ai: God is never disgusted by your problem or illness. He is ready to reach out where others have fled.

verses.text:
...Daughter,
your faith saved you
go in peace, and be healthy from your illness!
verses.ai: Healing brings true inner peace that protects the body from returning symptoms.

verses.text: ...and the power of the Lord was upon Him to heal them!
verses.ai: The atmosphere of God's presence is always charged with the power of physical restoration.

verses.text:
It was at that hour that He healed many from ailments,
and diseases
and from evil spirits...
verses.ai: God has a "same hour"—your moment of supernatural visitation and deliverance.

verses.text: ...Get up, take your bed and go! And now the husband has recovered...
verses.ai: An order that cancels many years of paralysis and helplessness.

verses.text: ...He went, washed, and came back sighted!
verses.ai: A step of obedience to God's word brings radical insight and the opening of new possibilities.

verses.text: Heal the sick... freely received, freely give!
verses.ai: Divine health is free for us, because Christ has already fully paid for it.

verses.text:
and heal the sick,
what's in it
and say to them: The Kingdom of God has drawn near to you!
verses.ai: Healing the sick is a business card that God has come to this territory.

verses.text: ...and they brought the sick... — and they were all healed!
verses.ai: Once again: 100% result without residue. The power of the early church knew no failure in healing.

verses.text:
...saw
that he has faith to be healed,
then he said in a loud voice: Stand straight on your feet!
verses.ai: Your inner willingness to accept healing will surely resonate with God's word and lift you up.

verses.text: And God performed many miracles with Paul's hands... - and their diseases were thrown away...
verses.ai: God's power can be transmitted even through objects, if pure faith is involved in the process.

verses.text: ...and give to another the gifts of healing by the same Spirit...
verses.ai: The Holy Spirit equipped the Church with special supernatural tools for the treatment of diseases.

verses.text:
Are any of you sick? Let him call the elders of the Church... and the prayer of faith will save the sick,
and the Lord will fail him...
verses.ai: Clear instructions for healing within the Christian community. The prayer of faith works without fail.

verses.text:
...and pray for each other,
to get well. Because the fervent prayer of the righteous is very powerful!
verses.ai: Mutual prayer support creates an impenetrable shield of health.

verses.text: This is my joy in my poverty, that Your word revives me!
verses.ai: Each verse of Scripture is a sip of living water that regenerates your strength.

verses.text:
When I walk even through the valley of the shadow of death
fear no evil
because you are with me...
verses.ai: Even if medical forecasts paint the darkest scenarios, God's presence removes all fear.

verses.text:
The Lord is my light and my salvation,
who will I be afraid of? The Lord is the stronghold of my life,
who will I be afraid of?
verses.ai: When your foundation is God Himself, no news or symptom can derail you.

verses.text: In the day of fear, I hope in You!
verses.ai: The right algorithm: as soon as a fear or a symptom comes, you instantly switch your attention to God's promise.

verses.text: God is my salvation! I am safe, and I am not afraid...
verses.ai: Your security is not based on health insurance, but on the name of the Almighty.

verses.text: You keep the thought, leaning on You, in perfect peace...
verses.ai: Fixing the mind on God's character is the best prevention of mental and physical failure.

verses.text: ...If God is for us, then who is against us?
verses.ai: If the Creator of the Universe has signed your health, no diagnosis or symptom has legal force.

verses.text: Where, death, is your victory? Where is your sting, death?
verses.ai: An ironic challenge to the main enemy of humanity. Death and disease have lost their poisonous teeth.

verses.text: Be strong and courageous... He will not leave you or forsake you!
verses.ai: God does not abandon His projects halfway. If He has begun the process of your restoration, He will bring it to completion.

verses.text:
...be strong and brave? do not be afraid and do not be afraid,
for the Lord is with you...
verses.ai: It takes courage to keep God's promises when symptoms try to lie in your face.

verses.text: ...and do not be sad, because joy in the Lord is your strength!
verses.ai: Joy works as pure fuel energy for your immunity. Forbid yourself to be sad.

verses.text:
God! His way is immaculate,
the purified word of the Lord,
He is a shield for all who turn to Him!
verses.ai: God's Word passed all the tests for reliability. You are under reliable cover.

verses.text: There are many evils for the righteous, but the Lord delivers him from all of them!
verses.ai: Problems can arise, but the key word here is "from everyone". No crisis will last forever.

verses.text: Put your longing on the Lord, and He will support you...
verses.ai: Throw all the emotional burden, fears and worries on His shoulders. It will be easier for you to breathe.

verses.text: In God is my salvation and my glory, the rock of my strength...
verses.ai: Your stability is fixed on the Eternal Rock, which cannot be shaken by any storm.

verses.text:
My body and my heart are dying,
— God is the rock of my heart and my destiny forever and ever!
verses.ai: Even if your physical strength is at its limit, the inner core of God keeps your structure steadfast.

verses.text:
on the day
when i called
You heard me, encouraged me, poured strength into my soul!
verses.ai: Instant response to your sincere cry for help. A spiritual injection of strength.

verses.text: Good Lord, He is a refuge in the day of adversity...
verses.ai: The best place to be in an outbreak of sickness is to take refuge in God's character. Absolute security reigns there.

verses.text: Blessed be the God... Who comforteth us in all our sorrows...
verses.ai: God's comfort is not just sympathy, it is effective help that removes the cause of your tears.

verses.text: ...My grace is enough for you, because My strength is revealed in weakness...
verses.ai: When you are at the height of your weakness, God's power is most evident, making you a conqueror.

verses.text: For you have been saved by grace through faith, and this is not of yourselves, it is the gift of God...
verses.ai: A golden poem about salvation. We do not buy God's favor by good works. Salvation is a pure, sovereign gift (grace) of God that we simply accept by faith.

verses.text:
but excuse themselves for nothing,
by his grace,
through the redemption that is in Jesus Christ...
verses.ai: Legal and spiritual dimension. We were guilty before God's judgment, but Christ paid our debt, and now God justifies us as a "gift" by His grace.

verses.text: Because the grace of God appeared, which saves all people...
verses.ai: Grace is not just an abstract concept. It was embodied and became visible in the Person and mission of Jesus Christ. It is open and available to everyone, without any restrictions.

verses.text:
That we have redemption in Him by His blood,
forgiveness of sins
through the riches of His grace...
verses.ai: The price of our salvation is the blood of the Son of God. But the yardstick by which God measures our forgiveness is not our merits, but the boundless "riches of His grace."

verses.text:
who saved us and called us with a holy call,
not for our deeds
but according to His decree and grace, which was given to us in Christ Jesus before eternal times...
verses.ai: God's plan for your salvation was not impromptu. His grace was intended for us in the plan of the Creator even before the creation of the material world.

verses.text:
Because of this faith,
to be by grace
so that the promise would be certain for all descendants...
verses.ai: If salvation depended on our impeccability, the promise would be uncertain (for we often fall). But because it is based on God's grace, it is steadfast and reliable.

verses.text: And we all received Him from His fullness, and then grace upon grace...
verses.ai: An incessant flow. The grace of the New Testament is superimposed on God's favor of the Old Testament, creating an endless, bountiful resource of God's blessings for us.

verses.text:
And the apostles testified with great power about the resurrection of the Lord Jesus,
and grace was great on all of them!
verses.ai: Church of the first days. The sermon about Christ was accompanied by "great grace", which melted the hearts of the listeners and manifested itself in miracles and the incredible unity of the community.

verses.text:
And the Angel said to her: Do not be afraid,
Mary,
because you have found grace [grace] in God!
verses.ai: Annunciation to the Virgin Mary. Being chosen to give birth to the Messiah was not a reward for any superhuman works, it was God's sovereign grace that set her apart from others.

verses.text:
And all testified to Him,
and marveled at the words of grace,
that flowed from His mouth. And they said: Isn't this the son of Joseph?
verses.ai: Sermon of Jesus in Nazareth. His words were so imbued with love, grace and divine authority that it caused the shock and amazement of his countrymen.

verses.text:
Prophets inquired and investigated about this salvation,
that preached about grace,
intended for you...
verses.ai: The Old Testament righteous throughout the ages tried to look ahead, realizing that the New Testament era of grace would come, when God would act with unprecedented generosity.

verses.text:
The law has come
that sin may abound. And where sin multiplied,
there began to exceed grace...
verses.ai: The incredible scale of God's mercy. When human iniquity reaches its peak, God's grace is even more powerful, overcoming and washing away all dirt.

verses.text:
For sin must not rule over you,
- because you are not under the Law,
and under grace!
verses.ai: The secret of holiness. Under the law, man tries not to sin by his own strength and is constantly defeated. Under grace, we receive the inner power of the Holy Spirit, which breaks the backbone of sinful habits.

verses.text:
I do not reject the grace of God! For when righteousness is acquired by the Law,
then Christ died in vain...
verses.ai: If a person believes that he can be saved by following rules, fasting or rituals, he is literally nullifying the death of Jesus on the cross. Trying to earn salvation is an insult to God's grace.

verses.text:
you
that you are justified by the Law,
remained without Christ, fell away from grace!
verses.ai: A serious theological warning. Returning to legalism and hoping for one's own righteousness is a departure from the only working mechanism of salvation - from grace.

verses.text:
What shall we say? Shall we remain in sin
that grace may increase? Absolutely not!
verses.ai: Protection against abuse. Grace is not a license to sin. A true understanding of God's grace causes aversion to sin, not a desire to continue sinning under the guise of God's forgiveness.

verses.text:
So what? Shall we sin
for we are not under the Law
and under grace? Absolutely not!
verses.ai: Repetition of the thesis for a warning. A man who has obtained freedom thanks to the favor of the king does not immediately run to rob a bank; on the contrary, she becomes the most loyal subject.

verses.text:
How much more torment
what do you think
the one who trampled the Son of God... and despised the Spirit of grace will deserve it!
verses.ai: The Holy Spirit is called the Spirit of grace. Deliberately, fiercely rejecting the gospel message after a person has experienced God's grace is the most serious spiritual crime.

verses.text:
And God has the power to enrich you with all grace,
so that you always have all abundance in everything,
were enriched by every good deed...
verses.ai: Grace covers all areas, including emotional and material. God gives His grace in abundance, so that we do not just survive, but have something to share with others.

verses.text:
And the God of all grace,
Who has called you to His eternal glory in Christ Jesus,
may He Himself perfect you, after a short suffering, may He strengthen you, may He confirm you and make you steadfast!
verses.ai: Our God is called the "God of all grace." Suffering on earth is temporary, but His grace uses it as a tool to harden our soul and make it steadfast.

verses.text:
Our Lord Jesus Christ Himself and God our Father,
Who loved us and gave us eternal comfort and good hope in grace...
verses.ai: A source of psychological and spiritual comfort. Our hope and comfort during life's storms is not based on positive thinking, but on God's grace.

verses.text:
...and you too,
younger,
obey your elders. And all of you have humility to one another, because God opposes the proud, but gives grace [grace] to the humble!
verses.ai: Repeating the commandment by the apostle Peter. Humility in relationships between people within the community attracts God's special blessing and peace.

verses.text:
As employees, we beg
so that you do not take God's grace in vain!
verses.ai: Human responsibility. Grace is a huge advance of power. To accept it and not change one's life in any way, remaining passive, is to take God's grace "in vain."

verses.text: So, my son, be strong in the grace that is in Christ Jesus!
verses.ai: Guidance for a young leader. Timothy had challenges, fears, and weaknesses, but Paul points to the only true source of psychological strength—the grace found in Christ.

verses.text:
I always thank my God for your sake for God's grace,
which was given to you in Christ Jesus...
verses.ai: Gratitude for others. When we see spiritual changes, talents, or a good heart in our brothers or sisters in the faith, we should praise God for it, because it is the result of His grace in them.

verses.text:
As he arrived and saw the grace of God,
I was glad
and urged everyone to remain steadfast in the Lord...
verses.ai: Barnabas comes to Antioch. The grace of God can be "seen" externally - through the changed faces of former sinners, their love, joy and zeal in service.

verses.text:
when God
Who chose me from my mother's womb and called me by His grace,
liked...
verses.ai: Paul's testimony about his vocation. God knew and was preparing him long before Saul himself realized it. Grace works in advance.

verses.text: through Whom we received grace and apostleship in obedience to faith among all nations for His Name...
verses.ai: Service is also grace. To be useful to God, to change the world around us, is a privilege given to us by God, not our own merit.

verses.text: if you have only heard of the government of the grace of God given to me for you...
verses.ai: Grace is given to leaders not for personal pride or enrichment, but "for you" - to serve the needs of the community and protect the people.

verses.text:
to me
the least of all saints,
the grace was given to preach the unfathomable riches of Christ to the Gentiles...
verses.ai: Paul's humility. The more a person understands the scale of God's grace, the less it seems to himself in his own eyes.

verses.text:
By the grace of God,
given to me
I, like a wise architect, laid the foundation, and another builds on it...
verses.ai: Wisdom in work. The ability to properly build a church, raise children, or create projects is a gift of God's grace that requires responsibility from us.

verses.text:
For this is our praise: the testimony of our conscience,
that in the holiness and purity of God,
not in carnal wisdom, but in the grace of God we lived in the world...
verses.ai: Worldview basis. A Christian is guided in life not by a pragmatic, selfish calculation ("carnal wisdom"), but by the principles of God's grace and honesty.

verses.text:
Because through grace,
I will give
I tell each of you not to think more of yourself than you should think, but to think modestly...
verses.ai: Weasel cures megalomania. Realizing that everything we have is borrowed from God forces us to treat others with respect and humility.

verses.text: ... grace to you and peace from God, our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ!
verses.ai: Paul's standard but profound greeting. Grace always comes FIRST, because without God's grace, a person will never be able to experience true inner peace.

verses.text: Grace to you and peace from God, our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ!
verses.ai: The repetition of this blessing at the beginning of the letter to the Corinthians is a church that had many problems. They were in critical need of God's grace for correction.

verses.text: Grace to you and peace from God, our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ!
verses.ai: Again and again, the apostle immerses readers in the concept of God's favor, reminding them of what their relationship with the Creator is based on.

verses.text: Grace to you and peace from God the Father and our Lord Jesus Christ...
verses.ai: Even his stern message to the Galatians, who had begun to fall away from legalism, Paul begins with a reminder of the grace from which they are trying to turn away.

verses.text: Grace to you and peace from God, our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ!
verses.ai: The entrance gate to the majestic Ephesian message, which reveals the cosmic mysteries of the Church through the prism of God's blessing.

verses.text: ...Grace to you and peace from God, our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ!
verses.ai: Protection from heresies. The Colossians tried to search for secret knowledge, but Paul brings them back to the base—to the grace of Jesus.

verses.text: ...Grace to you and peace from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ!
verses.ai: Congratulations to the young church, which experienced severe persecution, but stood firm thanks to God's support.

verses.text: Grace to you and peace from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ!
verses.ai: Reassurance of God's goodness against the background of the eschatological anxieties of the Thessalonians.

verses.text: Grace to you and peace from God, our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ!
verses.ai: A personal letter to a friend. Even in solving difficult domestic and social issues (the case of slave Onesimus), an atmosphere of grace prevails.

verses.text:
Timofey,
to the true son in faith: grace,
mercy, peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus, our Lord!
verses.ai: In the pastoral letters, Paul adds the word "grace". A church leader, in addition to grace and peace, critically needs God's mercy for his own mistakes.

verses.text:
Timofey,
beloved son: grace,
mercy, peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus, our Lord!
verses.ai: Repetition of a tender and strong parental blessing for the son in spirit before his most difficult trials.

verses.text:
Titus,
to the true son according to the common faith: grace and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus,
Our Savior!
verses.ai: An introduction for a missionary on the island of Crete, known for its difficult, customary character of the population. Grace can change even Cretans.

verses.text: ... may grace and peace be multiplied to you!
verses.ai: The Apostle Peter wishes not just for the presence of grace, but for its "increase" - so that it becomes more and more in the lives of scattered and suffering Christians.

verses.text:
May grace and peace be multiplied to you in the knowledge of God and Jesus,
Our Lord!
verses.ai: The key to increasing grace is an intellectual and spiritual "knowing" of God. The better we know His character, the more His power is at work in us.

verses.text:
May grace be with you
mercy
peace from God the Father and from Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, in truth and love!
verses.ai: Blessings from the apostle of love John. The grace of the Son of God works where the balance of objective truth (truth) and sincere attitude (love) is maintained.

verses.text: Because some people have chosen themselves... who turn the grace of our God into debauchery...
verses.ai: A stern warning against false teachers. To turn grace into fornication is to think that because God is good, one can knowingly live in fornication and sin. This is an insult to God.

verses.text:
And the Lord passed before his face,
and said: Lord,
The Lord God is merciful and gracious, long-suffering, and abundant in mercy and truth...
verses.ai: Revelation of God's name to Moses. Our God, by His genetic essence, is a God of grace, who is inclined to forgive, endure and love.

verses.text:
And now for a short moment we had a favor from the Lord,
our God
Which left us the remains...
verses.ai: Return from Babylonian captivity. Even small glimpses of freedom, the restoration of the temple are considered by the righteous as an undeserved favor from the Creator.

verses.text:
He made memorial signs for His miracles,
gracious and merciful [full of grace] Lord!
verses.ai: Memories of the miracles of the Exodus. The entire history of God's relationship with people is a monument to His incredible grace and patience.

verses.text:
I will remember the mercies of the Lord,
about the glory of the Lord,
for all that the Lord has done to us, and for His great kindness... that He has done to them according to His mercy and according to His great mercy!
verses.ai: The prophet enumerates the manifestations of God's favor, recalling that the foundation of Israel's relationship with God has always been His undeserved parental favor.

verses.text: May the grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you!
verses.ai: Farewell to the Corinthians. Even after many remarks, Paul leaves them in the safe hands of God's favor.

verses.text:
...what came to you
and fruitful and growing all over the world,
as it is with you from the day you heard and knew the grace of God in truth...
verses.ai: Dynamics of the Gospel. When a person sincerely "knows the grace of God in truth", his life automatically begins to bear good fruits of character and actions.

verses.text:
We inform you
brothers
about the grace of God given to the Macedonian churches...
verses.ai: He showed grace in generosity. The Macedonian churches, being in extreme poverty and persecution, thanks to God's grace, were able to collect enormous financial aid for the poor Christians in Jerusalem. Grace makes the heart generous.

verses.text:
Because God so loved the world,
who gave his only begotten Son,
that whosoever believeth in Him should not perish, but have eternal life
verses.ai: The highest point of God's love is sacrifice. God gave the most precious thing to save us.

verses.text: He who does not love has not known God, because God is love
verses.ai: Love is not just one of God's attributes, it is His very essence.

verses.text:
But God proves His love for us by
that Christ died for us
when we were still sinners
verses.ai: God did not love us for our merits, but when we were farthest from Him.

verses.text: We love Him because He first loved us
verses.ai: Our ability to love is only a response to the love that God has already poured out on us.

verses.text: The Lord appeared to me from afar and said: I have loved you with eternal love and therefore extended My mercy to you
verses.ai: God's love has no beginning and no end, it was there even before we were born.

verses.text:
That's love
that we did not love God
and He loved us and sent His Son as propitiation for our sins
verses.ai: God Himself is always the initiator of reconciliation and love.

verses.text:
god
rich in mercy
because of His great love, with which He loved us, and we, who were dead in trespasses, made alive together with Christ
verses.ai: His love is so great that it spiritually resurrects a person.

verses.text: Greater love hath no man than this, that he lay down his life for his friends
verses.ai: Jesus calls us His friends and proves it by His willingness to die for us.

verses.text: For as the heavens are high above the earth, so great is His mercy to those who fear Him
verses.ai: The scale of God's love and mercy cannot be measured by human standards.

verses.text:
Because I'm sure
than death
neither life... nor any other creature will be able to separate us from the love of God, which is in Christ Jesus our Lord
verses.ai: There is no power in the universe that can destroy God's love for a believer.

verses.text: For the mountains will move and the hills will be shaken, but My mercy will not depart from you
verses.ai: Even if the whole world around us crumbles, God's faithfulness will remain the same.

verses.text: Praise the Lord, for He is good, for His mercy endures forever
verses.ai: A reminder that God's goodness and mercy endure forever.

verses.text:
So,
know
that the Lord your God is God, a faithful God, who keeps covenant and mercy to those who love him
verses.ai: God always keeps His word and remains faithful to His promises of love.

verses.text:
But you
god
God is generous and merciful, longsuffering and many-merciful and true
verses.ai: God is in no hurry to punish, His nature is filled with patience and kindness.

verses.text: Will a woman forget her baby?... But even if she forgot, I will not forget you
verses.ai: God's love is stronger and more reliable than the strongest human love - maternal love.

verses.text:
The Lord your God is in your midst... He will comfort you in His joy,
will be merciful in His love
verses.ai: God doesn't just love us, He sincerely rejoices in each of us.

verses.text: Because the Lord is good, His mercy is forever, and His faithfulness is from generation to generation
verses.ai: God's favor is passed down through the generations, reaching our children and grandchildren.

verses.text: Put all your worries on Him, because He cares about you
verses.ai: God is deeply concerned about our daily struggles and worries.

verses.text:
And the hair on your head is all accounted for. So,
do not be afraid: you are worth more than many birds
verses.ai: God knows the smallest details about us, because we are of great value to Him.

verses.text: The Lord is my Shepherd, I will not lack anything
verses.ai: As a good shepherd cares for his sheep, so God provides for all human needs.

verses.text: For thus says the Lord... whoever touches you touches the apple of His eye
verses.ai: God protects His people as the most sensitive and important part of His heart.
God offers His strength in place of our weakness, sustaining us in difficult moments.

verses.text: The Lord will protect you from all evil; the Lord will save your soul
verses.ai: God's love acts as a reliable spiritual and physical shield.

verses.text: Because He commanded His Angels about you to guard you in all your ways
verses.ai: God mobilizes heavenly forces to protect those He loves.

verses.text: And until your old age I will be the same, and until your gray hair I will carry you
verses.ai: God's care continues throughout human life — from infancy to old age.

verses.text:
If we confess our sins,
then he
being faithful and righteous, forgive us our sins and cleanse us from all unrighteousness
verses.ai: God's love is expressed in His willingness to completely erase our past when we repent.

verses.text: As far as the east is from the west, so far has He removed our iniquities from us
verses.ai: When God forgives, He never reminds a person of their sins again.

verses.text:
He will have mercy on us again,
trample down our iniquities. You will throw all our sins into the depths of the sea
verses.ai: God does not collect our mistakes, His mercy overcomes judgment.
There is no sin so filthy that God's love cannot wash it away.

verses.text: He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds
verses.ai: God acts as a gentle physician to those who have experienced emotional or mental pain.

verses.text: I, I Myself will smooth over your transgressions for the sake of Myself and I will not remember your sins
verses.ai: God forgives us based on His own nature of love, not on our merits.

verses.text: Therefore, there is now no condemnation to those who are in Christ Jesus
verses.ai: God's love frees man from guilt and fear of punishment.

verses.text: Mercy rises above judgment
verses.ai: God's desire to have mercy is always stronger than the need to punish.

verses.text: The Lord is close to the brokenhearted, and He saves the humble in spirit
verses.ai: When a person feels broken, God becomes closer to them than ever.

verses.text: Because You created my entrails, woven me in my mother's womb... I am wonderfully made
verses.ai: Each person is a unique masterpiece, thought out by God with love.

verses.text: And to those who accepted Him, to those who believed in His name, He gave the power to be children of God
verses.ai: Faith in Jesus opens the door to God's family.

verses.text: Do not be afraid, for I have redeemed you, I have called you by your name; you are mine
verses.ai: God knows everyone personally by name, claiming His love rights for us.

verses.text: For you are His creation, created in Christ Jesus for good works
verses.ai: We are God's work of art, created for a beautiful life.

verses.text: Because you were bought at a high price. Therefore glorify God in your body
verses.ai: Our worth is determined by the price paid for us—the life of Jesus Christ.

verses.text:
So,
get dressed
as God's chosen, holy and beloved, in heart mercy, kindness
verses.ai: Knowing that we are loved by God should change our character.

verses.text: Because you are precious in My eyes, precious, and I have loved you
verses.ai: God's direct confession to a person is how much he means to Him.

verses.text:
And I will be your Father,
and you shall be My sons and daughters,
- says the Lord Almighty
verses.ai: God promises a close, family relationship to everyone who follows Him.

verses.text: Favorites! We are now children of God, but it has not yet been revealed that we will be
verses.ai: The status of a child of God is a present reality that will have an even grander continuation.

verses.text:
I leave you peace
My peace I give you... Let not your heart be troubled and not be afraid
verses.ai: God's love gives a deep inner peace that does not depend on external circumstances.

verses.text:
And the peace of God,
which surpasses all understanding
will keep your hearts and your thoughts in Christ Jesus
verses.ai: This peace cannot be grasped by logic, it simply protects our mind from stress.

verses.text: Come to Me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest
verses.ai: A loving God invites those who are tired of life to find rest in Him.

verses.text: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in faith
verses.ai: The source of true joy and optimism is in a relationship with the Creator.

verses.text: I lie down peacefully and sleep, because You, Lord, are the only one who allows me to live in safety
verses.ai: God's love and protection give a person a healthy sleep and freedom from night terrors.
Christ's victory gives us reason for peace even in the midst of life's storms.

verses.text: You will show me the way of life: fullness of joy before Your face
verses.ai: Being in God's presence fills a person with absolute joy.

verses.text: May the Lord of peace himself give you peace always and in everything
verses.ai: God wants peace to accompany us in every area of ​​life.

verses.text:
You turned my crying into joy
took off my sackcloth and girded me with joy
verses.ai: God's love can transform our grief into triumph and happiness.

verses.text:
Because the wages of sin is death,
and the gift of God is eternal life in Christ Jesus,
Our Lord
verses.ai: Salvation is not earned, it is a free gift from a loving God.

verses.text:
When the grace and humanity of our Savior appeared,
god
He saved us not by works of righteousness... but by His mercy
verses.ai: The motive of our salvation was exclusively God's love for humanity.

verses.text: And I give them eternal life, and they will never perish, and no one will snatch them out of My hand
verses.ai: We are completely safe under the protection of Jesus.

verses.text: This testimony is that God has given us eternal life, and this life is in His Son
verses.ai: Having Christ in our hearts, we already have a guarantee of eternity.

verses.text:
Whoever hears My word and believes in Him,
who sent me
has eternal life and does not come to judgment
verses.ai: God's love frees the believer from the final fear of judgment.

verses.text: God ... according to His great mercy has regenerated us ... to an incorruptible inheritance
verses.ai: We have a wonderful future in heaven that will never fade away.

verses.text:
The will of Him
who sent me
is that everyone who sees the Son and believes in Him will have eternal life
verses.ai: God's desire is to save every person who turns to Jesus.

verses.text: And God will wipe away every tear from their eyes, and there will be no more death... because the former things have passed away
verses.ai: The final chord of God's love is the complete annihilation of suffering in eternity.
Man's complete journey from calling to glory is provided by God's plan of love.

verses.text: For my father and my mother have forsaken me, but the Lord will receive me
verses.ai: Even if the closest people betray, God will never turn away.

verses.text: He gives strength to the weary, and strength to the weak
verses.ai: When our inner resources are exhausted, God restores us with His love.

verses.text: The angel of the Lord encamps around those who fear him and delivers them
verses.ai: We are surrounded by supernatural protection because of His grace.

verses.text: But the Lord is faithful, who will strengthen you and protect you from the evil one
verses.ai: God's faithfulness guarantees protection against the spiritual attacks of evil.

verses.text: The name of the Lord is a strong tower: the righteous flees to it and is safe
verses.ai: The very mention of God and turning to Him gives shelter.

verses.text: If I go in the midst of sorrow, You will revive me
verses.ai: God does not always take away trials, but He always brings us through them.

verses.text: We know that everything works together for good to those who love God
verses.ai: God is able to turn even negative circumstances to the benefit of a person.

verses.text: Favorites! If God so loved us, then we must also love one another
verses.ai: God's love is a standard and a stimulus for how we treat our neighbors.

verses.text:
I give you a new commandment: love one another! How I loved you
so do you love one another
verses.ai: Jesus calls us to broadcast His sacrificial love to the world.

verses.text: There is no fear in love, but perfect love casts out fear
verses.ai: When we are confident in God's love, fear of the future, punishment, or people disappears.

verses.text: Because the love of Christ embraces (moves) us
verses.ai: God's love becomes the main motivation for living rightly and doing good.

verses.text: And above all this put on love, which is the totality of perfection
verses.ai: Love is the pinnacle of a person's spiritual growth.

verses.text: First of all, have sincere love for one another, because love covers many sins
verses.ai: Love moves us to forgive the faults of others, just as God forgives us.

verses.text: Love does not harm one's neighbor; therefore, love is the fulfillment of the law
verses.ai: If there is God's love in the heart, a person does not need thousands of rules in order not to sin.

verses.text: My children! We will love not with word or tongue, but with deed and truth
verses.ai: God's love is always active, and it teaches us to confirm our feelings with actions.

verses.text:
For I know the intentions
that I have about you
saith the Lord, intend for good, and not for evil, to give you a future and hope
verses.ai: God plans a good future full of hope for His children.

verses.text:
What the eye did not see
and the ear did not hear
and it did not enter the heart of man, what God has prepared for those who love Him
verses.ai: What God has prepared for us in the future is beyond our wildest imaginations.

verses.text: Yes, Your mercy and grace will accompany me all the days of my life
verses.ai: God's kindness is not a temporary flash, it is a companion for a lifetime.

verses.text:
Here,
I stand at the door and knock: if anyone hears My voice and opens the door,
I will enter it
verses.ai: God respects our will, but he lovingly waits for reciprocity and communication.

verses.text: There are many abodes in My Father's house... I am going to prepare a place for you
verses.ai: Jesus is preparing for each of us an eternal home where we will be with Him.
The highest reward of love is to see God face to face.

verses.text: And now the crown of righteousness is being prepared for me, which the Lord will give me
verses.ai: God lovingly rewards those who remain faithful to Him.

verses.text: ...and so we will always be with the Lord
verses.ai: The ultimate goal of God's love is our eternal and inseparable presence with Him.

verses.text: The Lord is good to all, and His generosity is in all His works
verses.ai: God's love is universal, it is open to everyone who lives on this earth.

verses.text:
And you will serve the Lord,
to your God
and He will bless your bread and your water, and take sickness away from you. There will not be one that throws away fruit, and one that is barren in your land - I will make the number of your days complete
verses.ai: God's blessing purifies even what you eat and drink, and guarantees a full life resource without a premature finish.

verses.text:
god
my god
I cried to You, and You healed me! Lord, You brought my soul out of Sheol, You revived me so that I would not go down to the grave
verses.ai: When it seems that the situation is deadly and you already have one foot in the grave, God's call brings you back to life from the very bottom.

verses.text: He forgives all your sins, heals all your ailments
verses.ai: The full package of God's services: total forgiveness of the soul plus total healing of the body. No disease is excluded from this list.

verses.text: ...and these waters will heal, and everything will live where this flow comes
verses.ai: God's grace works like a living stream: wherever it enters your body, there begins a turbulent life.

verses.text:
To fulfill what was spoken through the prophet Isaiah,
who says: He took our infirmities,
and suffered diseases
verses.ai: The New Testament confirms that the earthly ministry of Jesus was to free people from the burden of infirmities.

verses.text:
And,
how did jesus come out
He saw many people, and had mercy on them, and healed their sick
verses.ai: The driving force behind healing is God's mercy and compassion for your pain.

verses.text:
And He walked throughout Galilee... preaching the Gospel of the Kingdom,
and healing every disease,
and all evil between men
verses.ai: Healing was an integral part of God's plan. Where the Kingdom is preached, diseases disappear.

verses.text: ...And the strength of the people followed Him, and He healed them all
verses.ai: Pay attention to the word "all". God has no limits or exceptions for those who come to Him.

verses.text:
And they begged Him,
to at least touch the hem of His garment. And how many touched them
became healthy
verses.ai: Even minimal contact with faith in Jesus releases a colossal charge of health.

verses.text: ...and he healed those who needed treatment
verses.ai: The only condition for receiving God's healing is your need for it and your appeal to the Doctor.

verses.text:
Jesus spoke to her: I am the resurrection and the life. Who believes in me
even if he dies
will live
verses.ai: Christ is stronger than biological death. His presence nullifies any final judgments.

verses.text:
And through faith in His Name, His Name strengthened this,
whom you see and know. And faith
that from Him brought him full recovery before all of you
verses.ai: It is not your own perfect righteousness that heals you, but the faithful and authoritative power of the name of Jesus Christ.

verses.text:
...when You stretch out Your hand for healing,
and that signs and wonders may be performed in the Name of Your Holy Child Jesus
verses.ai: The early church always prayed for a visible, physical demonstration of God's power through healing.

verses.text:
And Peter said to him: Aeneas,
Jesus Christ heals you! stand up
and make your own bed! And he got up now
verses.ai: Healing is instantaneous. Christ's command raises a person from a chronic bed of infirmity in one second.

verses.text:
...Jesus of Nazareth,
how God anointed Him with the Holy Spirit and power. And he walked
doing good and healing all whom the devil had enslaved, for God was with Him
verses.ai: A clear separation: God gives strength and healing, and the devil tries to enslave with disease. God always wins.

verses.text: For the law of the spirit of life in Christ Jesus has set me free from the law of sin and death
verses.ai: The higher spiritual law (life and health) cancels the effect of the lower law (disease and biological destruction).

verses.text: The Lord will comfort him on the bed of sickness, he will turn all his bed in his sickness
verses.ai: Even in times of weakness, God personally cares for your comfort and transforms sickness into recovery.

verses.text:
Be not wise in your own eyes,
fear the Lord and turn away from evil,
- it will be medicine for your body and drink for your bones
verses.ai: Respect for God's standards and rejection of a sinful lifestyle work as the best preventive medicine.

verses.text:
my son
listen to my words
incline your ear to my things! ... For they are life to those who find them, and for the whole body it is healing
verses.ai: God's Word is a medicine capsule. When you sink it into the heart, it heals the entire body from head to toe.

verses.text: The light of the eyes gladdens the heart, good news strengthens the bones
verses.ai: Positive spiritual information literally strengthens your bone system and immunity.

verses.text: Pleasant words are dense honey, sweet to the soul and medicine for the bones
verses.ai: A good, encouraging word works like sweet medicine, restoring the balance of forces in the body.

verses.text: A joyful heart heals well, and a depressed spirit dries the bones
verses.ai: Joy is a free and extremely effective medicine with no side effects. Depression destroys health.

verses.text: And the resident will not say "I'm sick!
verses.ai: God's standard for His people is the complete eradication of the very concept of disease from the lexicon.

verses.text: ...Be brave, daughter, your faith saved you! And the woman recovered in the same hour
verses.ai: Your courage and faith are able to draw healing power from God at any time, regardless of the length of the illness.

verses.text: And Jesus went through all the cities and villages... and healed every disease and every infirmity
verses.ai: For Christ, there were no "difficult" or "incurable" cases. He closed any issues of pathologies.

verses.text: ...and laid them at Jesus' feet, and He healed them
verses.ai: The best place for your problems and diagnoses is at the feet of Jesus Christ. There they lose their power.

verses.text: ...Go, your faith has saved you! And now he saw, and followed Jesus on the road
verses.ai: The received healing transforms a person into an active and grateful follower of Christ.

verses.text: ...He laid his hands on each of them and healed them
verses.ai: God's individual approach. He does not heal with a conveyor belt, He knows and touches your pain.

verses.text: ...because power came from Him and healed everyone
verses.ai: Jesus is the source of pure power that subdues and destroys all pathology.

verses.text: ...Do not be afraid, just believe, and she will be saved
verses.ai: The first step to a miracle is to block fear. Fear stops power, but faith activates it.

verses.text: One of them, when he saw that he had recovered, returned and praised God with a loud voice
verses.ai: Gratitude for manifested health consolidates the miracle and makes it permanent.

verses.text: ...And He touched his ear and healed him
verses.ai: Jesus heals even enemies in the midst of conflict. His grace is limitless.

verses.text: ...The man believed the word that Jesus told him and left
verses.ai: You don't have to see visible signs right now. Just believe the Word and act as if everything has already happened.

verses.text:
...and gave them power over unclean spirits,
to drive them out
and heal every disease and every weakness
verses.ai: Healing is a matter of authority that Christ gave to His disciples. Illness has no right to dominate you.

verses.text: And many demons were cast out, and many sick people were anointed with oil and healed
verses.ai: The use of simple spiritual tools backed by heavenly sanction gives stable results.

verses.text:
And He called the Twelve,
and gave them power and authority... And sent them... to heal the sick
verses.ai: The church is authorized to be a territory of health and freedom from destructive influences.

verses.text:
so that the sick were also carried out on the street... so that,
how will Peter go
at least his shadow fell on one of them
verses.ai: When you are filled with God, your presence becomes so dense that even your shadow displaces sickness.

verses.text: ...Paul entered him and prayed, and laying hands on him, healed him
verses.ai: Wherever a servant of God goes (even after a shipwreck), he brings an atmosphere of healing.

verses.text: I will never forget Your commandments, because You revive me with them
verses.ai: God's commandments are instructions for the safe operation of your physical body.

verses.text: ...and a faithful ambassador is like medicine
verses.ai: To be the right person in the right place is to bring health to yourself and others.

verses.text: A tender heart is life to the body, but envy is rot to the bones
verses.ai: Emotional purity (absence of anger, resentment and envy) directly protects your skeleton from destruction.
