that is given to us
verses.ai: "Spill" is the Greek "ekkehyutai": poured out, like a liquid that fills the entire space. God's love for you is not a drop, not a portion. It is poured into the heart without measure.

verses.text: Because I am the Lord, your Healer.
verses.ai: "Yahweh Rapha" is one of the names of God. Healing is not just something He does, it is part of Who He is. You are not contacting a service, but a Person.

verses.text:
He heals the brokenhearted
and bandages their wounds.
verses.ai: "Bandages" is the image of a doctor treating a wound carefully and carefully. God doesn't just proclaim healing—He touches the place of pain personally.

verses.text:
But He took our sickness upon Himself
and bore our pains.
verses.ai: "Took" and "carried" are active verbs. Jesus doesn't just know about your pain. He picked him up and carried him. Your sickness was already upon Him—before it came to you.

verses.text: And by His wounds we are healed.
verses.ai: Past tense - "healed". Not "healing", not "healing". Healing has already taken place in the eternity of the cross. To receive it means to connect to what has already been done.

verses.text:
He Himself took our ailments
and suffered diseases.
verses.ai: Matthew quotes Isaiah after Jesus had healed many. The evangelist shows that every healing is not an exception, but a fulfillment of a promise. The cross and the ministry of healing are one reality.

verses.text:
And the prayer of faith will save the sick,
and the Lord will raise him up.
verses.ai: "Will save" is the same Greek word "sozo" used for salvation. Healing and salvation in the New Testament are one and the same word. God does not divide body and soul into separate departments.

verses.text:
And the power of the Lord was with Him
for healing
verses.ai: This is not just a fact about the past. The same Jesus, "the same yesterday and today," and the same healing power remain relevant. Time does not reduce power.

verses.text:
The Lord supports him on his sick bed;
You transform all his bed during his illness.
verses.ai: "Turning the bed" is an image of how a patient's bed is changed for convenience. God personally takes care of the details of your recovery. He is present even where you cannot move.

verses.text:
I want
clean yourself up
verses.ai: The leper asked: "If you want, you can." Jesus answered with two words: "I will." This is His answer to all who doubt His desire to heal. He wants

verses.text: By His stripes you were healed.
verses.ai: Peter repeats Isaiah already after the resurrection - as a fact that concerns the readers personally: "you are healed." Not Israel then, but you now. The personal pronoun makes the promise specific.

verses.text:
Because I will restore your health
and I will heal you of your wounds,
says the Lord.
verses.ai: "I will restore health" - literally "I will close the scar." God doesn't just remove the symptoms—He restores what was before the damage. His healing is a return to original wholeness.

verses.text:
Praise the Lord, my soul:
Who forgives all your iniquities,
that heals all your diseases.
verses.ai: "All" - twice in one verse. Not "some", not "if deserved". Forgiveness and healing stand side by side as two dimensions of His one concern. Nothing is half-baked.

verses.text:
A gentle word is a tree of life,
but a wicked word is a broken spirit.
verses.ai: Words have a physical effect. "Tree of Life" is an image of continuous nourishment. What you say to yourself and others either heals or destroys. Language is medicine or poison.

verses.text:
A cheerful heart is a good medicine,
and a broken spirit dries up the bones.
verses.ai: Solomon describes psychosomatics thousands of years before medicine. Joy is not just a mood, but a physiology. God created the body to correspond to the state of the spirit.

verses.text:
Jesus says to him:
Get up, take your bed and walk.
verses.ai: The man was lying for 38 years. Jesus did not ask about sin, did not conduct a ceremony - just a command: "Get up." Healing sometimes comes as a team rather than a process. The Word of God is active.

verses.text:
Then the eyes of the blind will be opened,
and the ears of the deaf will be opened.
Then the lame man jumps like a deer
and the tongue of the dumb will sing.
verses.ai: Isaiah describes the signs of the Messianic time - and Jesus read this passage in the synagogue, saying "today it is fulfilled". Healing is not an exception, but a sign that the Kingdom has already come.

verses.text:
The Spirit of the Lord is upon me,
for He anointed Me...
to declare absolution to the wounded.
verses.ai: "Wounded" is the Greek tetraummenos: literally traumatized, broken inside. Jesus' mission includes healing the inner wounds—those that are not visible on the outside, but which hurt the deepest.

verses.text:
And he went about all Galilee,
preaching in their synagogues
and casting out demons.
And healed many.
verses.ai: Healing is not a separate, specialized program, but part of the normal movement of Jesus. He didn't stop for "healing sessions" - He just went, and healing went with Him.

verses.text:
And for you who fear my name,
the sun of righteousness will rise
with healing in his wings.
verses.ai: "In the wings" is an image of a solar disk with "arrows" of rays. Healing is not in darkness or mystery. It comes with light. Where His presence descends, sickness recedes.
